subject: [RFC PATCH v3 4/4] locking: Add contended_release tracepoint to spinning locks

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: The reviewer has not posted any comments or feedback on the patch yet.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes extending the contended_release tracepoint to queued spinlocks and rwlocks, aiming to minimize hot path impact by combining contention check, trace call, and unlock in an out-of-line function.
